mapper.select: SELECT vacuum_trend_metrics_id AS vacuumTrendMetricsId, database_id AS databaseId, table_name AS tableName, collected_at AS collectedAt, bloat_bytes AS bloatBytes, bloat_ratio AS bloatRatio, dead_tuple_total AS deadTupleTotal, last_vacuum AS lastVacuum, last_autovacuum AS lastAutovacuum FROM vacuum_trend_metrics WHERE database_id = #{databaseId} AND table_name = #{tableName} ORDER BY collected_at DESC LIMIT 1
SELECT CAST(NULL AS VARCHAR) as index_name, CAST(NULL AS NUMERIC) as bloat_ratio, CAST(NULL AS TIMESTAMP) as collected_at WHERE 1=0
SELECT DISTINCT table_name FROM vacuum_trend_metrics WHERE database_id = #{databaseId} AND table_name IS NOT NULL ORDER BY table_name ASC
